mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper Windows script to a newer version that includes automatic JAR download capabilities.

mvnw.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper script to a newer version that includes automatic JAR downloading capabilities.
mvnw.after: if [ -r "$BASE_DIR/.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.jar" ]; then ... else ... download logic ... fi

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.0.1 to align with Java 17 and Spring Framework 6.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6 APIs required for modern reactive stacks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 17 to match the new Spring Boot 3 baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Java 17; compiling with Java 11 will result in runtime errors or missing API support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace synchronous web starter with reactive webflux starter to align with Spring Boot 3 reactive best practices.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project migrates to a fully reactive stack; the old synchronous starter is incompatible with the new reactive Redis and WebSocket implementations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace synchronous Redis starter with reactive Redis starter.
pom.xml.why_exists: The application logic is being migrated to reactive streams; the synchronous Redis client is incompatible with the new reactive context.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove synchronous WebSocket starter as it is replaced by WebFlux WebSocket support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 WebFlux provides native WebSocket support; the separate synchronous starter is redundant and potentially conflicting.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove WebJars dependencies (sockjs, stomp, jquery) as the frontend client is likely decoupled or updated.
pom.xml.why_exists: These dependencies are no longer needed for the new reactive WebSocket implementation or are served externally.
DevTools is often removed in production-ready or native-image builds to reduce overhead and avoid conflicts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add reactor-test dependency for testing reactive streams.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to write unit tests for the new reactive components using StepVerifier.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Testcontainers JUnit Jupiter dependency for integration testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Enables containerized Redis testing in CI/CD pipelines.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Testcontainers BOM for version management.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures consistent versions of Testcontainers modules.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot Maven Plugin configuration to use new image syntax and AOT processing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 plugin requires new configuration structure for Docker images and supports AOT compilation for native images.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add native profile with GraalVM native-maven-plugin for native image compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 has first-class support for GraalVM native images; the old setup was likely manual or incompatible.

src/main/docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Update Redis container image to a newer major version compatible with the application's requirements.
Adjust Redis volume mount path to match the directory structure of the updated Bitnami Redis image.
Update application container images to use the new native build version.
Explicitly define startup dependencies for application services to ensure Redis is available.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/SpringR.general_idea: Replace explicit @EnableAsync and @EnableConfigurationProperties annotations with Spring Boot 3.x auto-configuration behavior.
Remove unused import for ApplicationProperties class.
Remove unused import for EnableConfigurationProperties annotation.
Remove unused import for Bean annotation.
Remove unused import for EnableAsync annotation.
Remove unused import for RestTemplate class.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Replace imperative Redis message listener configuration with a reactive ApplicationRunner to align with Spring WebFlux and Spring Boot 3.x reactive stack.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and Spring Data Redis 3.x deprecate/remove imperative listener containers in favor of reactive APIs; the old MessageListenerAdapter pattern is incompatible with the new reactive listener implementation.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Replace imperative StringRedisTemplate with ReactiveStringRedisTemplate to support non-blocking Redis operations in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.why_exists: Spring Data Redis 3.x aligns with the reactive stack; imperative templates are deprecated or removed in favor of reactive counterparts for WebFlux applications.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Explicitly configure LettuceConnectionFactory with RedisProperties to replace auto-configured imperative connection factory.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x changes auto-configuration behavior for Redis; explicit configuration ensures compatibility with the new reactive connection factory requirements.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Remove imperative RedisTemplate bean as it is no longer used in the reactive configuration.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.why_exists: The imperative RedisTemplate is incompatible with the new reactive stack and is no longer referenced by any beans.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Update RedisAtomicInteger initialization to use RedisConnectionFactory directly instead of RedisTemplate.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.why_exists: RedisAtomicInteger constructor signature changed in Spring Data Redis 3.x to accept RedisConnectionFactory directly, removing dependency on RedisTemplate.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Add RedisAtomicLong bean for active user counter using the new RedisConnectionFactory-based constructor.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.why_exists: Consistent with the migration to use RedisConnectionFactory directly for atomic counters in Spring Data Redis 3.x.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Add @Profile("!heroku") annotation to exclude this configuration on Heroku deployments.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.why_exists: Heroku uses a different Redis configuration strategy; this prevents conflicts with Heroku-specific Redis setup.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Add @Slf4j annotation for logging support in the reactive listener runner.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.why_exists: Required for the log statements in the new ApplicationRunner bean.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Set proxyBeanMethods=false to optimize Spring Boot 3.x configuration class processing.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x recommends proxyBeanMethods=false for configuration classes that do not require proxying, improving startup performance.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Replace hardcoded Redis keys with constants from ChatConstants.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.why_exists: Improves code maintainability and consistency by using centralized constants.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Remove unused RedisReceiver bean as it is replaced by the reactive listener.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.why_exists: The imperative RedisReceiver is no longer used in the reactive configuration.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/model/C.general_idea: Replace manual boilerplate (constructors, getters, setters, toString) with Lombok annotations to reduce code verbosity.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/model/C.before: public ChatMessage(Integer id, String message, String hostname) { ... } public Integer getId() { ... }

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/model/C.general_idea: Add Jackson annotation to ensure private fields are serialized/deserialized without explicit getters.
Implement Serializable interface to allow the object to be serialized for network transmission or caching.
Add a new field to track the number of users currently online.

src/main/k8s/configMap.yaml.general_idea: Remove unused Spring topic configuration properties from the Kubernetes ConfigMap.

src/main/k8s/deployment.yaml.general_idea: Update the Kubernetes deployment container image tag to match the new application version and architecture.
Increase CPU resource limits and requests for the container.

src/main/resources/static/app.js.general_idea: Refactor jQuery selectors into cached variables to improve performance and reduce DOM lookup duplication.
Replace SockJS/STOMP client with native WebSocket API for direct connection handling.
src/main/resources/static/app.js.before:
var socket = new SockJS('/redis-chat');
	stompClient = Stomp.over(socket);

src/main/resources/static/app.js.general_idea: Update message handling logic to parse raw WebSocket data instead of STOMP frames.
Add logic to display user connection status alerts based on WebSocket messages.
Update disconnect logic to close native WebSocket and show disconnection alert.
Add function to update the users online count in the UI.
Update send message logic to use native WebSocket send method.
Modernize variable declarations from var to let/const.
Use strict equality operator (===) instead of loose equality (==).
